# Setup new and fix existing MIS for lender BFL and TCL

: Ranjan kumar Singh
Created time: January 6, 2025 1:30 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: February 19, 2026 7:12 PM
Owner: Lalit Bihani

# **What problem are we solving?**

- Setup new and fix existing MIS for lender BFL and TCL

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

1. Send repayment details to TCL for the collection status = “SUCCESS_WITH_LENDER_RECON_FAILED” in daily MIS
    
    We want an automated email to be setup at 6PM everyday for TCL repayments with collection status "SUCCESS_WITH_LENDER_RECON_FAILED" to the below recipients.
    
    [tushar.parab@tatacapital.com](mailto:tushar.parab@tatacapital.com)
    
    cc :
    
    [pinkesh.shah@tatacapital.com](mailto:pinkesh.shah@tatacapital.com)
    
    [las_product@tatacapital.com](mailto:las_product@tatacapital.com)
    
    [keerthireddy.madduri@tatacapital.com](mailto:keerthireddy.madduri@tatacapital.com)
    
    [tata.operations@voltmoney.in](mailto:tata.operations@voltmoney.in)
    
    The .csv file should contain data of all “SUCCESS_WITH_LENDER_RECON_FAILED”, attached below is sample reference file
    
    MIS will help TCL team to account the repayment on time.
    
    Format: 
    
    [data (9) (2).csv](Setup%20new%20and%20fix%20existing%20MIS%20for%20lender%20BFL%20and%20/data_(9)_(2).csv)
    
2. Send repayment MIS to BFL
    1. Send repayment MIS to BFL at 12 AM daily
    2. The .csv file should contain data from (T-1 12AM) to (T0 12AM), attached below is a sample reference file.
    3. File format: 
    
    [BFL-Repaymentfile.csv](Setup%20new%20and%20fix%20existing%20MIS%20for%20lender%20BFL%20and%20/BFL-Repaymentfile.csv)
    
3. Change BFL MIS time as per below requirement:
    
    ![Screenshot 2025-01-13 at 1.06.45 PM.png](Setup%20new%20and%20fix%20existing%20MIS%20for%20lender%20BFL%20and%20/Screenshot_2025-01-13_at_1.06.45_PM.png)
